loop1.title: Cumulative Energy
loop1.note: Showing cumulative active and reactive energy (kWh/kVArh) for this month; capacity/target/subsidy limits are not measured for this panel.

loop1.title: Energy Consumption Trend
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy per feeder family (UPS, BPDB, HHF) — per-phase energy isn't measured for this asset; rated/contracted lines are omitted as nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Today live power analysis
loop1.note: Showing live active and reactive power from the 7-day window; rated capacity and peak markers are omitted because the asset's nameplate rating is unknown.

loop1.title: Daily Power Demand by Feeder
loop1.note: Showing UPS and BPDB feeder demand — HHF feeder has no members on this panel (honest-blank). Load Factor is not measured (no nameplate rating).
